title: Tools, computers and items you use for work
description: Deductions for tools, computers, internet, stationery, books and other items you use for work.
keywords: tools and equipment, deduction for tools, computer cost deduction, mobile phone deductions, depreciation of tools, claiming tools on tax, claim work bag, cosmetics, ipad, sunscreen, TGA, AUST L, therapeutic goods

child_links.title: Tools and equipment to perform your work
child_links.description: Deductions for tools or instruments you use for work, including the cost of repairs and insurance.

child_links.title: Mobile phone mobile internet and other devices
child_links.description: Deductions for mobile phone calls and internet expenses you incur for a work-related purpose, including the device.

child_links.title: Computers laptops and software
child_links.description: Deductions for computers, laptops and software you use for work, including the cost of repairs.

child_links.title: Home phone and internet expenses
child_links.description: Deductions for home phone, internet and other online services you use for work.

child_links.title: Bags and cases for work items
child_links.description: Deductions for bags, cases, luggage, lunch boxes and travel mugs you use for work.

child_links.title: Stationery and office supplies
child_links.description: Deductions for stationery and supplies such as pens, printer ink, and paper you use for work.

child_links.title: Office furniture and equipment
child_links.description: Deductions for equipment or furniture, such as a desk or chair you use for work, including repairs.

child_links.title: Books periodicals and digital information
child_links.description: Deductions for books, journals, periodicals, digital information, newspapers and magazines you use for work.

child_links.title: Interest and transaction expenses to buy items for work
child_links.description: Deductions for interest and transaction fee expenses, you incur on items you buy for work.

child_links.title: Depreciating assets you use for work
child_links.description: As an employee, find out how to claim for your depreciating assets and work out decline in value.
